nasb.text: The Lord visited Hannah; and she conceived and gave birth to three sons and two daughters. And the boy Samuel grew before the Lord.

esv.text: Indeed the Lord visited Hannah, and she conceived and bore three sons and two daughters. And the boy Samuel grew in the presence of the Lord.

cnv.text: 耶和華眷顧哈拿，她再懷孕，先後生了三個兒子和兩個女兒。那孩子撒母耳在耶和華面前，漸漸長大。

ccb.text: 耶和华眷顾哈娜，她又生了三个儿子和两个女儿。年少的撒母耳在耶和华面前渐渐长大。
